Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0x8894 "KICKOFF-0500-8894" -Di_irq_exit=1 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$36 sta $01 jsr $0500 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Kick Off (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Added an init routine at $0500 which copies 256 bytes of data from $0520 down to $0300 so that the dump can start at $0400. It then jumps to the entry point at $8894 (it couldn't use RTS because of the copy overwriting the boot code).
